title: New large Eva Sadamoto artbook
wikitext:
[]: New large Eva Sadamoto artbook             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Tue Apr 07, 2026 8:01 am Release this year. B4 paper size. It seems to be very pricey, but a good edition. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: New large Eva Sadamoto artbook             Quote Post by Joseki » Tue Apr 07, 2026 8:10 am It doesn't matter what happened and how long he's been out of Eva, to me Sadamoto's art is simply how Evangelion is supposed to look. A must buy it seems.

[]: Re: New large Eva Sadamoto artbook             Quote Post by Superblunt » Wed Apr 08, 2026 7:22 am Just when I thought I have bought almost all of Evangelion art books in existence, another expensive one has to release It's probably just a collection of all the Sadamoto artwork spread over half a dozen other books ontained into one, but I'm a sucker for art books and the FOMO is too severe.
